rows.label: qev027101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Now then... Please listen
to what I have to say. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0002
rows.name:
I realize you may be bewildered by this sudden approach,
but I am rather poor at the light conversation meant to
smooth over relations. I ask for your forbearance. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Soon, it will be permitted for a representative
of the alien species to participate in
the NLA provisional government. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0004
rows.name:
The task of coordinating this
has fallen to us, the Orphe. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0005
rows.name:
At present, based on the general consensus,
we have selected candidate representatives
from among the Ma-non and the Nopon, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0006
rows.name: Here, a problem has arisen. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Just as the Ma-non candidate, who is
highly motivated to participate in
politics, began to gain the advantage... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0008
rows.name:
The policy proposal put forth by the
Ma-non candidate, Adappin, was
completely beyond our comprehension. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Food rations will be pizza. Wages paid
for employment will also be pizza. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0010
rows.name:
And he insists on levying a tariff on
all of these known as the Pizza Tax. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0011
rows.name:
It is quite impossible... We
cannot present this as the
consensus of all our alien species. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0012
rows.name:
However, Adappin is already fully motivated. I hear
he acts as though he has already entered the government
and has even begun buying up pizza parlors. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0013
rows.name:
This is a deeply troubling situation.
The Ovah within me continually cries
out that something must be done. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0014
rows.name: And so, I arrive at my point. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Given that it seems impossible to
drain Adappin's motivation now... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0016
rows.name:
We have decided to plot
his forced downfall. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0017
rows.name:
This may be an act that damages the
fairness of the electoral system. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0018
rows.name:
However, as this is our first foray into political
participation, we do not wish to send someone
who does not align with our intentions. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0019
rows.name:
I don't suppose we could
ask for your cooperation? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_JNK0010
rows.name: Cooperate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_SEL0011
rows.name: Be complicit in the Ma-non representative's downfall.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_JNK0020
rows.name: Object[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest that there must be another way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0020
rows.name: Oh, I see. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0021
rows.name:
I thank you for your understanding and
cooperation. Having an Earthling as an
ally is highly reassuring for us. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It may not be the most pleasant work,
but this, too, is a necessary evil for
smooth inter-species relations. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0023
rows.name:
If we both view it pragmatically, we can
simply balance our sense of duty against
our feelings of guilt on the scales. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Another way...? Indeed, it is not
as if we haven't considered them. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Utilizing our own unique physical characteristics...
That is, repeatedly splitting to increase our numbers
and manipulating the vote count was one idea, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Recklessly multiplying our population
is something we wish to avoid as a
matter of concern for our species. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Therefore, having the Ma-non step
down seems to be the best measure
for all species involved. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0028
rows.name:
We will use a drug to orchestrate
Adappin's downfall. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0029
rows.name:
No, do not worry. We are not attempting
to poison him for an assassination. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0030
rows.name:
This drug is one of the secret medicines passed down among the
Orphe. It dulls one's judgment and carries the effect of forcing
the subject to make only affirmative statements to all questions. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0031
rows.name:
In other words... Regardless of
their own intentions, they will
only be able to answer "Yes." [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Who would trust a politician who only
says "Yes" to absolutely everything... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0033
rows.name:
True, perhaps no one would trust a
person who proposes something like
a Pizza Tax to begin with, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0034
rows.name:
For example, if someone proposed
the abolition of the Pizza Tax
and Adappin answered "Yes"... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0035
rows.name:
That would be a fatal gaffe that
would cause him to lose even his
original base of support. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0036
rows.name:
That is precisely what
we are aiming for. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Thus, I want you to gather the
materials required to synthesize
this secret medicine. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0038
rows.name:
A Sibercaseras Mushroom and a Sturdy
Dragon Bone. These are the two items
currently lacking for the synthesis. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0039
rows.name:
I ask that you gather these and
return here to me once more. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0040
rows.name:
It is no exaggeration to say that
the future of all of us who live
on Mira rests upon this task. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0041
rows.name: Let us create a better future together. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0042
rows.name:
The Ma-non camp's movements have become
more active. It must be said, Adappin's
popularity is quite remarkable. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0043
rows.name: We cannot afford to fall behind. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0044
rows.name:
I ask you to urgently gather the Sibercaseras
Mushroom and the Sturdy Dragon Bone needed
for synthesizing the secret medicine. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0045
rows.name:
Thank you for your continued
assistance. How is your progress? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0046
rows.name:
Yes, this is indeed the Sibercaseras
Mushroom and the Sturdy Dragon Bone.
I have received them without fail. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0047
rows.name:
With this, the Orphean secret
medicine can be synthesized. Let
us set to work immediately. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0048
rows.name:
Would you mind waiting just a
moment? It is not a process
that takes very much time. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0049
rows.name:
Thank you for waiting. The synthesis
of the secret medicine is complete. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0050
rows.name:
Now, all that remains is to have Adappin
ingest this secret medicine, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0051
rows.name:
Conveniently enough, the medicine is tasteless
and odorless. I believe mixing it into his
food is the best course of action. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0052
rows.name:
That being said, infiltrating his home would be
difficult, and it would be quite problematic if our
infiltration was discovered and became a scandal. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0053
rows.name:
If we could just discover
some lifestyle habit of his
that presents an opening... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0054
qev027101_MSG0055
rows.name:
I want you to find the perfect
timing and mix the secret
medicine into Adappin's food. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0056
rows.name:
If we fail in this, an unprecedented
and terrifying world of Pizza
Supremacy awaits us. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0057
rows.name:
For the sake of a society where
everyone can live in peace, I
implore you to accept this request. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0058
rows.name:
We cannot allow NLA to become
a dictatorial society run by
a Pizza Supremacist... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0059
rows.name:
Please, mix that secret medicine—the
one that makes him only say "Yes"—
into Adappin's food. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0060
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Yes, so you successfully had him
ingest the secret medicine? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0061
rows.name:
In that case, I am looking
forward to seeing how Adappin's
next speech turns out. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027101_MSG0062
rows.name:
I believe he is holding it in the Fountain
Plaza in the Commercial District. Would
you mind going to see how it unfolds? [ST:wait ]
